root_cause: CVR fell −34% primarily due to a seasonal demand shift: the pre window captured US spring break peak at WDW while the post window is off-season, with lower-intent visitors driving LP2S and S2C declines within the fixed segment (MB · Google Ads). A secondary distinct issue — elevated A2O failure rates for Magic Kingdom 1-Day Ticket (experience 36344, TIDs 76930/76934/76935) — contributed an estimated 17 lost orders in the post period; the specific mechanism (WDW API failure, fraud over-blocking, or payment gateway) is a DATA GAP pending order_attempted_events_v2 access. Inventory is unlimited capacity, ruling out any supply-side explanation.
